bundle.longDescription: Pick a nation and conquer the world. Domination is a turn-based world conquest simulator with AI diplomacy, economy, and 250+ nations.

updater._comment_pubkey: TAURI 2 UPDATER PUBLIC KEY (key ID 25319536ux5C1F4A73). Baked into the v1.0.2+ client at compile time; runtime updater verification of latest.json uses the matching private key held ONLY in GitHub Secrets. To rotate: `cargo tauri signer generate -w ~/.tauri/keys/keypair.key` locally, paste the new PUBLIC line here, then save the new PRIVATE line + its password as GitHub Secrets TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY and TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD. Rotation breaks verification for older client releases; bump the version alongside.
